productDisplayName: Red Chief Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear! Product Details Square toed shoe with slip on styling, has elasticated gussets at the sides of the tongue Padded inner Upper adhered to the outsole Thick TPU outsole with a stacked heel and patterned grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
